CustomField.description: The text string used to join names of Household members in generated names and greetings. Common values are " & " (produces "John & Jane") or " and " (produces "John and Jane"). Include spaces around the connector as they are not added automatically.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Text joining Household member names, such as " & " or " and ". Include surrounding spaces.
CustomField.label: Name Connector
